title: Marketplace Manager - Amazon India - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Amazon India - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Amazon India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Jodhpur-based team.

About Amazon India:
Amazon India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
